findings.summary: Manifest-first catalog rebuild can still return no graph_query capability on the BOOK_MANIFEST package main path; local test expected 1 capability and received 0.

Runtime query gate checks producer run presence and artifact metadata fields, but does not fully compare run record artifactIds, input fingerprint, tool/schema version, and generation time against metadata rows.
Manifest files, artifact metadata, state artifacts, checkpoints, and producerRunIds are partially bound, but runtime gate still lacks full run-record artifact/hash/input semantic binding.
Runtime compatibility digest mismatch and createdAt gates are fixed, but package layout, runtime reader, and embedding model/dimension fields are not fully enforced by the TS runtime digest gate.
Local verification passed unified-query and runtime-gate tests, but graphrag-book-hotplug-catalog.test.ts still has one failing manifest-first capability projection case.
